query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search, Google submitted **5 filings** between June and December 2024. Here are the docket numbers:

| Filing Date | Filing Title | Docket Number(s) |
|-------------|--------------|------------------|
| **06/28/2024** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-468-005** |
| **09/19/2024** | Motion to Intervene of Google LLC | **ER24-2891-000**, **ER24-2888-000**, **ER24-2890-000**, **ER24-2893-000**, **ER24-2894-000**, **ER24-2889-000** |
| **11/05/2024** | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-011** |
| **12/10/2024** | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | **AD24-11-000** |
| **12/27/2024** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Inc. Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-012** |

**Summary of unique docket numbers:**
- **AD24-11-000**
- **ER10-2835-012**
- **ER10-2835-011**
- **ER10-468-005**
- **ER24-2891-000**
- **ER24-2888-000**
- **ER24-2890-000**
- **ER24-2893-000**
- **ER24-2894-000**
- **ER24-2889-000**
